title: The Baked Studio – 'Dried Touch 12-Piece Small Rose And Tea Rose Stem Bouquet' Artificial Dried Flowers For Cake Decorating, Home Décor, Vases, Weddings, Bridesmaid Bouquets (Dusty Pale Pink)
features: BOUQUET: 12 Individiual 'Artificial Dried' Rose Stems Which Have Been Hand Tied To Make A Bouquet (6 Small Rose Stems And 6 Tea Rose Stems)
MATERIAL: Beautiful Flower Heads Made From Silk, Stems Made From Plastic
SIZE: Bouquet Height 30cm, Flower Heads Approx. 4/5cm

USE: This Artificial Bunch Makes A Perfect Addition To Many Floral Displays. They Are Perfect For Many Applications, Such As Cake Decorating, Floral Arrangements, Craft Projects and Flower Walls. They Are Especially Perfect For Turning Any Bake Into A Stunning Masterpiece
COLOURS: Available In A Range Of Colours
